data.title: Privacy First
data.description: Emphasizes user privacy as a core part of the brand identity.
data.technical_spec: End-to-end encryption by default for all communications.

data.title: Simplicity and Ease of Use
data.description: Maintains a simple and intuitive user interface that caters to a broad audience.
data.technical_spec: Minimalist design with focus on essential features and usability.

data.title: Global Connectivity
data.description: Fosters global communication by being accessible to users worldwide regardless of language or location.
data.technical_spec: Localized app versions and support for over 60 languages.

data.title: Reliability and Consistency
data.description: Focuses on providing a reliable and consistent messaging experience across all devices.
data.technical_spec: Regular updates and robust back-end infrastructure.

data.title: Community and Inclusion
data.description: Aims to build a community by creating features that enhance social connections.
data.technical_spec: Group chat features, broadcast lists, and status updates.
